bugs_found.title: Double-click ADD TO CART creates duplicate configurable product lines
bugs_found.root_cause: onConfigurableSubmit() in add-to-cart.vue missing `if (loading.value) return` guard — Vue reactivity doesn't propagate disabled state synchronously, allowing two clicks in same event loop frame

bugs_found.title: Cart quantity input accepts and persists invalid values (over-max, under-min, zero) — two-layer validation failure
bugs_found.root_cause_frontend: handleChange() in vc-add-to-cart.vue does not check isValid before emitting; cart-line-items.vue sets disable-validation=true
bugs_found.root_cause_backend: changeCartItemsQuantity xAPI mutation accepts ANY integer — no min/max/stock validation server-side

bugs_found.title: Rapid stepper clicks (0ms) lose increments — 5 clicks = qty 1-2 instead of 5
bugs_found.root_cause: Vue reactivity batches synchronous updates into single microtask flush; watcher fires once with coalesced value; debounced handler sends only last-seen value

resolved_issues.resolution: RESOLVED — Edit button exists inside collapsed 'Components list' accordion. Full edit-from-cart flow works correctly (Update cart, Create new configuration, separate line items).

business_rules_verified: BL-CAT-006 (PASS - required sections enforced before add-to-cart)
BL-CART-007 (PASS - different configs create separate lines; edit updates in-place)
BL-PRICE-001 (PASS - prices correct after config changes)
BL-CHK-003 (FAIL - double-submit prevention missing on configurable products)
BL-CART-001 (FAIL - max qty NOT enforced by server or client on cart quantity input)

exploratory.charter: Risk-based: quantity/state management edge cases for configurable products + cart
